headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused field guide showing how real estate agents use Super’s personal AI agents to run real computer workflows—follow-ups, listings, calendar coordination—and reuse a computer-use cache so repeated work gets faster and cheaper over time.
